message:
fix(frankenpandas): forward tracing + asupersync features (br-ii9u / fd90.59)

Continuation of fd90.58 — additional umbrella feature-forwarding
gaps surfaced by self-review: fp-frame exposes a `tracing` feature
(emits tracing spans on hot paths: groupby, rolling, resample, IO)
and fp-runtime exposes `asupersync` (async runtime integration).
Both are off by default in their respective crates so users without
the relevant runtime pay no dep cost.

The umbrella crate previously didn't expose either, leaving users
unable to opt into them without depending on fp-frame / fp-runtime
directly. Add to umbrella [features]:

  tracing = ["fp-frame/tracing"]
  asupersync = ["fp-runtime/asupersync"]

Both default-off (matches inner-crate defaults).

Verified:
  - cargo test -p frankenpandas --lib (default features) -> 5 pass
  - cargo build -p frankenpandas --features tracing
  - cargo build -p frankenpandas --features asupersync
  - cargo build -p frankenpandas --no-default-features --features tracing
  - clippy -D warnings clean under --features and --no-default-features
  - ubs Critical=0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -21,17 +21,26 @@ fp-join = { path = "../fp-join" }
 fp-runtime = { path = "../fp-runtime" }
 fp-types = { path = "../fp-types" }
 
-# Per br-frankenpandas-l6nr (fd90.58): forward fp-io's SQL backend
-# features so umbrella users can opt out of rusqlite via
-# `default-features = false` and pick a backend explicitly. Default
-# matches fp-io: sql-sqlite on. The sql-postgresql / sql-mysql
-# features are placeholders today (fp-io exposes them but doesn't
-# bind concrete backends yet — that's fd90 Phase 2).
+# Per br-frankenpandas-l6nr (fd90.58) and br-frankenpandas-ii9u
+# (fd90.59): forward inner-crate feature flags so umbrella users
+# can opt in/out without depending on inner crates directly.
+#
+# - SQL: forward fp-io's backend selection. Default is sql-sqlite
+#   (matches fp-io). sql-postgresql / sql-mysql are placeholders
+#   today (fp-io exposes them but doesn't bind concrete backends
+#   yet — that's fd90 Phase 2).
+# - tracing: forward fp-frame's optional `tracing` spans on hot
+#   paths (groupby, rolling, resample, IO). Off by default so users
+#   without a tracing subscriber pay no dependency cost.
+# - asupersync: forward fp-runtime's optional asupersync runtime
+#   integration. Off by default.
 [features]
 default = ["sql-sqlite"]
 sql-sqlite = ["fp-io/sql-sqlite"]
 sql-postgresql = ["fp-io/sql-postgresql"]
 sql-mysql = ["fp-io/sql-mysql"]
+tracing = ["fp-frame/tracing"]
+asupersync = ["fp-runtime/asupersync"]
 
 [package.metadata.docs.rs]
 all-features = true
